hypothetical_ai_effect: d≈0.15 [HYPOTHESIS]: AI dashboard only; collective trust cannot be automated

hypothetical_ai_effect: d≈1.10 [HYPOTHESIS]: AI prompts reflection but student must retain metacognitive ownership

hypothetical_ai_effect: d≈0.90 [HYPOTHESIS]: AI risk-flagging supports but cannot replace teacher's localized judgment
notes: ML can flag risk trajectories; teacher must synthesize with relational, contextual knowledge of individual students.

hypothetical_ai_effect: d≈1.00 [HYPOTHESIS]: AI can map task hierarchies; human expert must validate domain accuracy

hypothetical_ai_effect: d≈0.90 [HYPOTHESIS]: AI tier-tracking is legitimate; physical intervention delivery remains human

hypothetical_ai_effect: d≈0.70 [HYPOTHESIS]: AI can scaffold tasks matched to developmental stage; stage itself is biologically constrained

hypothetical_ai_effect: d≈0.30 [HYPOTHESIS]: AI group-composition optimization only; peer teaching exchange must be human
notes: Physical peer-to-peer teaching exchange is the causal mechanism; AI optimizing group composition touches only logistics.

hypothetical_ai_effect: d≈0.75 [HYPOTHESIS]: AI misconception detection is legitimate; schema restructuring requires human follow-up
notes: Generative AI can identify misconceptions in student writing and serve contrasting texts; deep schema restructuring benefits from teacher mediation.

hypothetical_ai_effect: N/A — not a manipulable intervention
notes: AI catalogs prior ability indicators; cannot alter baseline cognitive capacity.

influence: Strategy to integrate with prior knowledge
hypothetical_ai_effect: d≈0.70 [HYPOTHESIS]: AI schema-mapping is promising; analogies must connect to student's actual prior knowledge
notes: AI pre-diagnostic tasks can map active schema; customized analogies require accuracy about what student actually knows.

hypothetical_ai_effect: d≈0.50 [HYPOTHESIS]: AI success loops help short-term; long-term efficacy requires trusted adult relationship
notes: AI adaptive micro-scaffolds can foster immediate confidence; durable self-efficacy is built through human encouragement over time.

hypothetical_ai_effect: d≈-0.15 [HYPOTHESIS]: AI proxy degrades credibility; human delivery required
notes: Student perception of competence, trustworthiness, and goodwill is strictly interpersonal; AI fluency is not teacher credibility.

hypothetical_ai_effect: d≈0.75 [HYPOTHESIS]: AI video analysis is the legitimate use case; teacher must act on feedback
notes: AI computer vision can map talk-time, questioning patterns, and engagement; human teacher must interpret and adjust practice.

hypothetical_ai_effect: d≈0.60 [HYPOTHESIS]: AI can generate diverse transfer problem sets; teacher must model abstract principles
notes: AI generates near- and far-transfer problem sets; explicit modeling of cross-domain principles requires human instruction.

hypothetical_ai_effect: d≈0.40 [HYPOTHESIS]: AI discourse mapping supports teacher; peer reasoning exchange must be human
notes: Socio-cognitive friction and shared community context require physical peer presence; AI can map participation patterns and flag gaps.

hypothetical_ai_effect: d≈0.65 [HYPOTHESIS]: AI dynamic scaffolding is legitimate; fading must be explicitly programmed
notes: AI tutoring platforms can adapt hint specificity and difficulty in real-time; systematic fading required to prevent permanent dependency.

hypothetical_ai_effect: d≈0.60 [HYPOTHESIS]: AI difficulty calibration is useful; expert feedback on specific error pattern requires human
notes: Ericsson-model deliberate practice requires expert diagnosis of specific errors; AI handles adaptive difficulty but not expert qualitative feedback.

hypothetical_ai_effect: d≈0.40 [HYPOTHESIS]: AI summarization delivery only if student does the summarizing
notes: Critical mechanism conflict: if AI summarizes for the student, student does not build the capacity. AI must evaluate student summaries, not produce them.

hypothetical_ai_effect: d≈0.40 [HYPOTHESIS]: AI engagement monitoring supports; authentic persistence is human-mediated
notes: AI disengagement detection and micro-incentives support effort; sustained academic persistence mediated by teacher relationships.

influence: Interventions for students with learning needs

hypothetical_ai_effect: d≈0.70 [HYPOTHESIS]: AI mnemonic generation at scale is genuinely AI-native

hypothetical_ai_effect: d≈0.55 [HYPOTHESIS]: AI platforms can require predictions before tasks; self-regulation act must be student's

hypothetical_ai_effect: d≈0.65 [HYPOTHESIS]: AI voice recognition for fluency tracking is genuinely AI-native

hypothetical_ai_effect: d≈0.60 [HYPOTHESIS]: AI can help draft clear learning goals; verbal delivery and live checking must be human

hypothetical_ai_effect: d≈0.55 [HYPOTHESIS]: AI Socratic prompts support; student must do the elaborating

hypothetical_ai_effect: d≈0.55 [HYPOTHESIS]: AI reflection prompts are useful scaffolds; internalization requires human guidance

hypothetical_ai_effect: d≈0.50 [HYPOTHESIS]: AI fast task-level feedback is legitimate; relational and self-regulation feedback must be human

hypothetical_ai_effect: d≈0.35 [HYPOTHESIS]: AI gamification supports short-term focus; deep motivational orientation requires human mentorship

hypothetical_ai_effect: d≈0.55 [HYPOTHESIS]: AI curriculum pacing is legitimate; human mentorship for gifted students remains important

hypothetical_ai_effect: d≈0.50 [HYPOTHESIS]: AI goal-setting prompts are useful; accountability requires teacher enforcement

hypothetical_ai_effect: d≈0.55 [HYPOTHESIS]: Spaced retrieval vocabulary at scale is genuinely AI-native

hypothetical_ai_effect: d≈0.35 [HYPOTHESIS]: AI divergent prompts support; collaborative evaluation requires human facilitators

hypothetical_ai_effect: d≈0.10 [HYPOTHESIS]: AI monitoring only; direct behavior modification requires human relationship

hypothetical_ai_effect: d≈0.45 [HYPOTHESIS]: AI rubric co-construction is useful; self-appraisal requires human validation

hypothetical_ai_effect: d≈0.40 [HYPOTHESIS]: AI anonymization of grading reduces bias; conscious relationship-building remains human
